single: What is the volume of the solid formed by the rotation?
Find the volume of the solid formed.
Determine the volume of the resulting solid.
What is the volume of the solid of revolution?

scene:solid_revolution_scene.object_description: a plane shape rotated 360 degrees about the marked axis to form the shown solid of revolution

global.json_output_contract: Return a JSON object with exactly two keys: "annotation" and "answer".
global.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return a JSON object with exactly one key: "answer".
global.answer_hint_number: set "answer" to the resulting volume rounded to one decimal place
global.answer_hint: set "answer" to the resulting volume rounded to one decimal place
